Title: Requires fashion sellers to be accountable to standardized environmental and social due diligence policies, and establishes a fashion remediation fund
Summary: Requires fashion sellers to carry out environmental due diligence for the portions of their business related to wearing apparel, footwear or fashion bags, including wearing apparel, footwear or fashion bags produced as a private label; establishes a fashion remediation fund.
LawCode: Add §399-mm, Gen Bus L; add §97-ccc, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to requiring fashion sellers to be accountable to environmental standards and establishing the interstate fashion environment accountability act; and to amend the state finance law, in relation to establishing a fashion remediation fund
